chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 218 of 2016 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on office objection / reply at “A” 2.
